docs.title: helldive.py
docs.text:
A Python client library for the Helldivers 2 API.

Note: Some parts of the API have been reverse-engineered by the community and may not perfectly reflect the current state of the game.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
from helldivepy import HelldiveAPIClient

# The API requires X-Super-Client and X-Super-Contact headers for rate-limiting.
with HelldiveAPIClient(
    client="my-app",
    contact="me@example.com",
) as client:
    # Global war status
    war = client.war.get()
    print(war.now)
    print(war.statistics.player_count)

    # Recent dispatches
    for dispatch in client.dispatches.get_all()[:3]:
        print(dispatch.message)

    # All planets
    planets = client.planets.get_all()
    for planet in planets:
        if planet.event:
            print(f"{planet.name} is under attack by {planet.event.faction}")

docs.title: Modules
docs.text: Attribute Methods client.war get() -> War client.dispatches get_all() -> list[Dispatch], get(index) -> Dispatch \| None client.planets get_all() -> list[Planet], get(index) -> Planet \| None, get_events() -> list[Event] client.campaigns get_all() -> list[Campaign], get(index) -> Campaign \| None client.assignments get_all() -> list[Assignment], get(index) -> Assignment \| None client.space_stations get_all() -> list[SpaceStation], get(index) -> SpaceStation \| None client.steam get_all() -> list[SteamNews], get(gid) -> SteamNews \| None

docs.title: Client
docs.text:
HelldiveAPIClient is the main entry point. Instantiate it with your app name and contact info, then access data through its module attributes (client.planets, client.assignments, etc.).

Use it as a context manager to ensure the underlying HTTP connection is closed cleanly:

with HelldiveAPIClient(client="myapp", contact="me@example.com") as client:
    war = client.war.get()

docs.title: helldivepy.client.HelldiveAPIClient
docs.text:
HelldiveAPIClient(
    client: str = "helldivepy",
    contact: str = "github:ajxd2/helldive.py",
    base_url: str = "https://api.helldivers2.dev/api",
)

Create a new API client.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default client str

Your application name, sent as X-Super-Client. Identifies your app to the API operators.

'helldivepy' contact str

Contact info for your app, sent as X-Super-Contact. Typically a GitHub URL or email address.

'github:ajxd2/helldive.py' base_url str

API base URL. Override for testing or alternative deployments.

'https://api.helldivers2.dev/api'

docs.title: Enums
docs.text: Enumerations used across the API models. TaskType and TaskValueType are community-reverse-engineered — unknown values fall back to raw int rather than raising an error.

docs.title: helldivepy.enums.Factions
docs.text:
Bases: Enum

Known factions in the Helldivers 2 universe.

docs.title: Illuminate class-attribute instance-attribute
docs.text:
Illuminate = 'Illuminate'

Ancient alien civilization returned from beyond the Galactic Barrier.

docs.title: helldivepy.enums.CampaignType
docs.text:
Bases: IntEnum

Community-reverse-engineered campaign type codes. May be incomplete.

docs.title: helldivepy.enums.RegionSize
docs.text:
Bases: Enum

Size classification of a planetary region.

docs.title: helldivepy.enums.TaskType
docs.text:
Bases: IntEnum

Community-reverse-engineered task type codes. May be incomplete.

docs.title: helldivepy.enums.TaskValueType
docs.text:
Bases: IntEnum

Community-reverse-engineered value type codes for Task.values. May be incomplete.

docs.title: Models
docs.text: All models use automatic camelCase ↔ snake_case aliasing via Pydantic, so API responses deserialize transparently.

docs.title: helldivepy.models.War
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Global information of the ongoing war.

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Statistics
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Contains statistics of missions, kills, success rate etc.

docs.title: time_played instance-attribute
docs.text:
time_played: int

Total playtime including off-planet in seconds.

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Dispatch
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Communications from high command regarding war status updates.

docs.title: message instance-attribute
docs.text:
message: str

Dispatch content. Contains HTML span markup: [text].

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Planet
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Comprehensive planetary data integrating all available information.

docs.title: disabled instance-attribute
docs.text:
disabled: bool

Whether the planet is currently inactive.

docs.title: event class-attribute instance-attribute
docs.text:
event: Event | None = None

Active occurrence, if any.

docs.title: attacking instance-attribute
docs.text:
attacking: list[int]

Target planet indices this planet is attacking.

docs.title: regions instance-attribute
docs.text:
regions: list[Region]

Subdivisions with individual health and availability status.

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Biome
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Environmental classification system for planetary surfaces.

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Hazard
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Environmental threat present on a planet.

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Position
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Coordinate on the galactic war map.

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Region
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Planetary subdivision. Some fields may be absent when the region is inactive.

docs.title: is_available instance-attribute
docs.text:
is_available: bool

Whether the region is currently playable.

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Event
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Active planetary occurrence with temporal boundaries (e.g. a defense event).

docs.title: count instance-attribute
docs.text:
count: int

Historical occurrence count for this planet.

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Assignment
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Directive issued to Helldivers by high command (a.k.a. Major Order).

docs.title: progress instance-attribute
docs.text:
progress: list[int]

Per-task advancement values; injected into each Task during validation.

docs.title: reward class-attribute instance-attribute
docs.text:
reward: Reward | None = None

Primary reward (deprecated in favour of rewards).

docs.title: helldivepy.models.Task
docs.text:
Bases: APIModel

Constituent objective within an assignment requiring completion.

Note: type and the keys of values are community-reverse-engineered (TaskType, TaskValueType) and may be incomplete. Unknown values fall back to int.

docs.title: type instance-attribute
docs.text:
type: TaskType | int

Objective classification (community-reverse-engineered, may be incomplete).

docs.title: values instance-attribute
docs.text:
values: dict[TaskValueType | int, int]

Parsed valueType → value mapping. Keys are TaskValueType where known, else raw int.

docs.title: progress class-attribute instance-attribute
docs.text:
progress: int = 0

Raw progress value injected by Assignment during validation.

docs.title: goal property
docs.text:
goal: int | None

The target value for this task (kill count, liberation %, etc.)

docs.title: progress_perc property
docs.text:
progress_perc: float | None

Progress towards goal as a percentage (0.0–100.0), or None if not applicable.

docs.title: is_liberation_task property
docs.text:
is_liberation_task: bool

Liberation/defense tasks track progress via Campaign health, not Assignment.progress.

docs.title: election_end instance-attribute

Timestamp when the next destination vote concludes.

Timestamp when the current status transitions.

Bases: APIModel

Resource requirement for activating a tactical action.

docs.title: target_value instance-attribute

target_value: int

Required accumulation to activate the action.

docs.title: max_donation_ammount instance-attribute
docs.text:
max_donation_ammount: int

Individual contribution ceiling. Note: 'ammount' is an upstream API typo.

Bases: APIModel

Steam news article associated with the game.

docs.title: Modules
docs.text: Each module is accessed as an attribute on HelldiveAPIClient and handles one API resource group. All modules share the same pattern: get_all() returns a list, get(index) returns a single item or None on 404, and non-404 HTTP errors are re-raised.

docs.title: helldivepy.modules.war.WarModule
docs.text:
WarModule(client: HelldiveAPIClient)

Bases: BaseModule

Access the global war state.

docs.title: get
docs.text:
get() -> War

Fetch the current war status snapshot.

Returns:

Type Description War

The current War state including statistics and active factions.

docs.title: get_all
docs.text:
get_all() -> list[Dispatch]

Fetch all available dispatches.

Returns:

Type Description list[Dispatch]

A list of all dispatches, most recent first.

docs.title: get
docs.text:
get(index: int) -> Dispatch | None

Fetch a specific dispatch by ID.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default index int

The dispatch ID.

required

Returns:

Type Description Dispatch | None

The matching Dispatch, or None if not found.
